copy.source: I:\Staging\ACReporting\Data Products\2018 ACPR update\Ian SHP File\DOH_ACPR_2018

dataIdInfo.idPurp: Aged care services in Australia are funded and delivered in regions called Aged Care Planning Regions (ACPRs). There are 73 ACPRs across Australia.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: The 2016 ASGS SA2 shapefile from the ABS was used to produce the 2018 ACPR boundaries.
dataIdInfo.idAbs: The 2018 ACPRs are based on Statistical Area Level 2 (SA2) boundaries from the Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS) Australian Statistical Geography Standard (ASGS) 2016.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
